import { pack, packId, ref } from "@libar-dev/software-delivery-protocol";

// modelRefs name the pack's model-kind vocabulary specs; this one targets a behavior spec —
// the pack-coherence check fails the resolving-but-wrong-kind reference.
export const wrongKindModelRefPack = pack({
  id: packId("pack:checkout-v1"),
  title: "Checkout v1",
  specs: [ref("spec:orders.create-order")],
  modelRefs: [ref("spec:orders.create-order")],
});
